response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates extensive experience as a Senior Software Developer with over 6+ years of full-stack development, aligning well with the role's requirements. His background includes working with TypeScript, Node.js, React, and Kotlin/Java, as well as cloud platforms (AWS) and containerization (Docker/Kubernetes). His contributions to AI-agent infrastructure, high-performance microservices, and open-source projects showcase his versatility and technical depth. While his recent role at re:cinq (April 2025–Present) is very brief, his prior experience at Optilyz and other companies provides substantial evidence of his capabilities.
strengths: Strong full-stack development experience with TypeScript, Node.js, React, and Kotlin/Java
Proven track record in building scalable, high-performance applications (e.g., microservices handling millions of requests)
Experience with AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling, including MCP and code generators
concerns: Recent role at re:cinq (April 2025–Present) is very brief, raising questions about commitment or role fit
Limited explicit experience with Nest.js (primary stack) in the resume, though Node.js proficiency suggests adaptability
Some roles (e.g., GISCollective) involve non-primary technologies (Dlang), which may dilute focus on the required stack

key_factors.factor: AI-agent infrastructure and modern tooling experience
